offer: For restaurant managers processing 5–15 cash transactions/day, inaccurate cash reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We provide end-of-day cash reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash reconciliation leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for cash transactions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
